question: What is the main subject of the image? Select from the following options: (A) A collage of pictures of a woman wearing a mask. (B) Cannot be determined. (C) A painting of a person wearing a skull mask. (D) Pictures of the faces of famous artists in art and artwork.
answer_choices: A collage of pictures of a woman wearing a mask
A painting of a person wearing a skull mask
Pictures of the faces of famous artists in art and artwork
inpaint_prompt: Fill the masked region naturally, removing whatever objects appear there. Preserve the rest of the image exactly.
inpaint_negative_prompt: text, watermark, logo, artifacts, distortion, blur
